intro.heading: Surgeons & Medical Professionals kjdhfkjshdfkjshfkjhfcjkerf
paragraphs: Aesthetic Aftercare is an RN-led post-operative nursing and recovery support service based in Los Angeles. We provide private, one-on-one nursing support for patients following cosmetic and aesthetic procedures, strictly in accordance with the operating surgeon’s written post-operative instructions.
Our goal is to support safe recovery, reduce unnecessary ER visits, and provide continuity of care in a private setting.

items.title: Licensed, Experienced Registered Nurses
items.description: Highly trained RNs with expertise in post-operative care.

items.title: Insured and Operating Within RN Scope of Practice
items.description: Fully insured and compliant with professional nursing standards.

items.title: Independent Post-Operative Support Service
items.description: Focused care that aligns with your surgeon’s instructions.

what_we_do.title: Serving Los Angeles and Surrounding Areas
what_we_do.intro_text: Available throughout LA and nearby communities.
services: We specialize in post-operative care tailored to patients recovering from cosmetic and aesthetic procedures. Our services ensure a safe, comfortable, and supported healing process.
Assistance with mobility and daily activities
Wound care support as directed by your surgeon
